zh.Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France,: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon於1376年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆洛也時，她的父親Ecuyer Jean de Roye36歲，母親Dame Jeanne de Bethune24歲。她於1395年4月27日與Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1434年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon于1376年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆洛也时，她的父亲Ecuyer Jean de Roye36岁，母亲Dame Jeanne de Bethune24岁。她于1395年4月27日与Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯福雷辛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1434年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian Roje: from a pet form of Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘generation, family, relatives’, e.g. Rodimir.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Roj, Rój or Roja (see Roy 4).

variants.name: Roy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Lucien, Normand, Andre, Jacques, Marcel, Emile, Laurent, Pierre, Cecile, Donat, Gilles.  Indian Dipak, Sumit, Amit, Ajit, Dipankar, Partha, Ranjan, Shyamal, Aloke, Amitava, Chitra, Gautam.
Scottish: nickname for a person with red hair or a ruddy complexion, from Gaelic ruadh ‘red’. Compare Reed .
English (of Norman origin): from Old French roi ‘king’, used as a nickname (see 3 below) and also as a personal name. Compare Ray 2.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon was born in 1376, in Roye, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Ecuyer Jean de Roye, was 36 and her mother, Dame Jeanne de Bethune, was 24. She married Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy on 27 April 1395, in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1434, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon est née en 1376, à Roye, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Ecuyer Jean de Roye, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Dame Jeanne de Bethune, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy le 27 avril 1395, à Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1434, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon 1376 in Roye, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ecuyer Jean de Roye 36 und ihre Mutter Dame Jeanne de Bethune 24. Sie hat am 27. April 1395 in Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1434 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon è nata il nel 1376 nel Roye, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Ecuyer Jean de Roye, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Dame Jeanne de Bethune, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy il 27 aprile 1395, nel Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1434, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdonが1376年にフランスピカーディソンメロイで生まれた時，父Ecuyer Jean de Royeは36歳，母Dame Jeanne de Bethuneは24歳であった。1395年4月27日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスフレシンでChevalier Jean IV de Créquyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1434年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon(이)가 1376년 프랑스 피카디 솜 로예에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ecuyer Jean de Roye(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dame Jeanne de Bethune(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1395년 4월 27일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 프레신에서 Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon nasceu em 1376, em Roye, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Ecuyer Jean de Roye, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Dame Jeanne de Bethune, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy em 27 de abril de 1395, em Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1434, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon родилась в 1376 г. в местности рои, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Ecuyer Jean de Roye было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Jeanne de Bethune, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy 27 апреля 1395 г. в местности фрессин, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1434 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de Roye Dame d'Espourdon nació en 1376, en Roye, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Ecuyer Jean de Roye, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Dame Jeanne de Bethune, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Chevalier Jean IV de Créquy el 27 de abril de 1395, en Fressin, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1434, a la edad de 58 años.
